description: Style Note Created for today's generation, this spinn Zoom casual shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love! Product Details Synthetic and felt upper with perforations at the midfoot has central lacing Low at the ankle and high at the collar well padded inside Foamy rubber midsole Single piece TPU outsole with multidirectional lugs Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
